arz: في مَحَلاَت حَيَوَانَات كَثِيرَة هُنَا في الْمَنْطِقَة
transliteration: fi mahalaet haywanaet kiteera hina fiilmanti'a
translations: there are a lot of pet shops in the area

arz: هَنزِل أشتري عيش بلدي علشان مفيش
translations: I will go out to buy local bread because there isn't any
gymnastics needs very high flexibility
I want a room that has air conditioning
I went to the bank and it was closed

arz: مُمكِن تِتعَلَّم اِلغَطس بِسُهولَة في مَصر
translations: you can easily learn diving in Egypt
the students are egyptian
how much exactly is the car battery?
as far as I'm concerned, this subject is over
he makes natural yogurt

arz: كِفاَيَة نور اِلشَّارِع، مِش لاَزِم تَنَوَّر اِلجِنِينَة
transliteration: kifaeya noor ilshaariA, mish laezim tanawwar ilgineena
translations: there is enough light from the street, no need to light the garden

arz: في السوق ده ممكن تشتري الحاجات بالدين
translations: In this market it is possible to buy things on credit

arz: لاَزِم تِعمِل تَمارين رِيَاضِيَة بِصِفَة مُسْتَدِيمَة عَلَشان تَأثِير
transliteration: laezim tiAmil tamareen riyadya bisifa mustadeema Aalashaenat'athar
translations: you have to exercise constantly in order to feel the effect

arz: الدنيا كانت زحمة جداً في وسط البلد أول إمبارح
transliteration: ildunya kaenit zahma giddan fi wust ilbalad 'awil 'imbaarih
translations: it was very crowded in the town centre the day before yesterday

arz: اِلكاَبتِن مِتأخَر عَن مَعاَد اِلتَدريب سَاعَة
transliteration: ilkabtin mit'achar Aan maAaed iltadreeb saeAa
translations: the captain is an hour late for the training

arz: في وَقت في السَّنَة بيبقى كُوَيِّس جِدّاً لِلغَطس
transliteration: fi wa'tafiilsana biyib'a kuwayis giddan l|ilghats
translations: there is time of year that it becomes very good for diving
all cats have claws

arz: بَعد مَا يِعَدّي اَلصيف هَيِبْتَدُوا مِن جِديد مَعَ اَلْسُوق اَلْأَخْضَر
transliteration: baAdama yiAaddiilseef hayibtidwa min gideed maAailsoo' il'achdar
translations: after summer, they will start anew with the green market
we will leave after the film has finished
I checked every form
[the] new teacher is nice

arz: وَضَعَ الْبَلَدُ حَقيقِيٌّ بَقيَ سَئًا جِدًّا
transliteration: wadaA ilbalad ha'ee'i ba'a sa' giddan
translations: the situation of the country has really deteriorated a lot
they will study practically in college
he behaves as if he has not done anything wrong
for two days I have been unable to sleep

arz: لاَ دَه نَافَع وَلاَ دَه بِيِنفَع
transliteration: la dah naefaA wala dah biyinfaA
translations: neither this is useful, nor that.
I almost fell into the ditch
there is still a while until time for school

arz: لاَزِم ياَكلوا بِإنتِظاَم عَلَشان اَلرّيجيم يِجي بِفايدة
transliteration: laezim yaklu bi'intizaem Aalashaen ilreegeem yigi bi|fayda
translations: you must eat regularly for the benefit of the diet to come
have you locked the door? yes, I have locked it

arz: في مَدارِس الرَّاهِبات الأولاد بيعرَفوا يعني إيه أدَب
transliteration: fi madaaris ilraahibaet il'aoolaed biyiArafu yaAni 'ieeh 'adab
translations: in convent schools children know what manners means

arz: إذا كان في بيض، ممكن نعمل عجة
transliteration: 'iza kaen fi beed, mumkin niAmil Aigga
translations: [If] there are eggs, we can make omelette

arz: الناس لازم تخلي المبنى في الحال
translations: people must leave the building right away

arz: هُوَّ مَا فِيش وَلا حِتَّة بِتْبِيع وَرْد؟
transliteration: huwwa mafeesh wala hitta bitbiyaA ward?
translations: Is there nowhere that sells flowers?

arz: أنا مِش مُهتَمَة إذا هِيَ عارِفَة وَلاَ
transliteration: 'ana mish muhtama 'iza hiya Aaarifa wala la'
translations: I(f) don't care whether she knows or not
tonight we will choose a present for Ahmed

arz: صَدَر حُكم ضِدَّه وَ هُوَ خَارِجُ الْبِلَاد
transliteration: sadar hukmadidd|uh wa huwa chaarig ilbilaed
translations: They imposed a sentence against him while he was outside the country
the music is very loud

arz: اِلوَرشَة هَيِبقى مَعَاد هَخَمسَة إِلّا رُبَّع يَوْم اَلخَميس
transliteration: ilwarsha hayib'a mAad|ha chamsa 'ila rubbaA yoom ilchamees
translations: the workshop will be thursday at a quarter to five
could you shut up?

arz: هَنَوْقَف نَشَاط الشِرْكَة مُؤَقَّتًا لِغَايَة مَا إِذا تَحَسَّنَت الأوضاع
transliteration: haniwa'af nashaat ilshirka muw'a'atan lighaeyit mail'aoodaaA tithassin
translations: we will close the company temporarily until the situation improves
[an] englishman will come to the office today

arz: يَادوب يَتحَرَّك عَلَشان مَعَاد الرِحلَة قَرَّب
translations: just move because the time of your flight is approaching
instead of going, call them
there is a bus on the bridge
leave some food for me

arz: الدنيا حرّ جداً بس لحسن الحظ الدنيا مطرّت
transliteration: ildunya harragiddan bassalihusn ilhazz ildunya mattarit
translations: it is very hot but fortunately it is raining

arz: اِلموضَة اِلسَنَة ديه غير اِلسَنَة اِللي فاَتِت
transliteration: ilmooda ilsana deeh gheer ilsana il-li faetit
translations: the fashion this year is different to last year
what is your number?
look(m) behind you

arz: اِلمُدَرِس موجود في اِلمَدرَسَة لِلسَّاعَة تَمَانِيَة
translations: the teacher was present in the school until eight

arz: قَبل ما يَبقى في تِكنولوجياَ اَلْحَيَاة كَانَت بَسيطَة
translations: before there was technology, life was simple
there is no bread at the shop
there is my teacher!
I(male) want [a] green apple

arz: مِن قُرَيِب كَانَ في مَهرَجانٍ في دُبَي
transliteration: min 'urayib kaen fi mahragaen fi dubai
translations: recently there was a festival in Dubai

arz: خُصوصاً في الظُروف الحالية لازم تاخد بالك من استهلاك المياه
transliteration: chusoosan fiilzuroof ilhalya laezim taechud baelak min 'istihlaek ilmayaeh
translations: especially in the current circumstances you have to take care with water consumption
during the next few days the parcel will be delivered to him

arz: إذاً إنتَ مِحتاج أي حَاجة، إسألني
translations: If you need anything, ask me!
this car is much faster

arz: هِناكَ في اِلقَاهِرَةِ النَّاسُ عَصَبِيَّةٌ جِدّاً
translations: the people in cairo are very irritable

arz: أي مَكانٍ على البحر سيبقى في هَذهِ الرُّطوبةِ العاليةِ جداً
transliteration: 'ai makaen Aala ilbahrahayib'a fee|ha rutooba Aaeliyya gidan
translations: anywhere by the sea will have a high humidity

arz: أنا ضِدّ أي عُنف على العموم
translations: I am against all violence in general
he is leaving the house and going immediately

arz: هُوَ ماشي عَكس الناس كُلَّها وَمِفَكِّر نَفسه صَحّ
transliteration: huwa maeshi Aaks ilnaes kull|aha wa mifakkar nafs|uh sahh
translations: he is going against the crowd and he thinks that he himself is right

arz: أنا أخرج أشتري شوية حاجات من بره
translations: I will go out to buy a few things from outside

arz: اِلمُسلِمين لاَزِم يِطَلَّعوا زَكَاة إتنين وَ نُصّ في اِلمِييَة
transliteration: ilmuslimeen laezim yitallaAw zakaet 'itneen wa nussafiilmiyya
translations: muslims must give two and a half percent poor tax
I have been in Egypt for five years
you must take the medicine once more
inside the house the climate is very pleasant
I feared that she was lost

arz: أمّا فَبالنسبة للجَوّ السنة ديه حَرّ جِدّاً
transliteration: 'amma fa bilnisba l|ilgaww ilsana deeh harragiddan
translations: concerning the weather this year, it is too hot

arz: مَعَنديش عَرَبِيَّة عَلَشَان مَفيش فُلُوس كِفَايَة
transliteration: ma|Andee|sh Aarabiyya Aalashaen mafeesh filoos kifaeya
translations: I don't have a car because there is not enough money
I am sure that he is lying
I(m) want to know more about you(m)
she parked the car in front of the garage

arz: مُمكِن تِبَعت اِلوَرَق بِتاَعَك بَعدين مِش لاَزِم دِلوَقتي
transliteration: mumkin tibaAt ilwara' bitaeA|ak baAdeen mish laezim dilwa'ti
translations: you can send your papers later, you don't need to now
avoid crowded streets
Do you have enough?
the brothers have long beards
the bank is opposite my house
all of them are here except mohammed
our son is a teacher
I feel like going but I don't have time

arz: هَتِلاَقي اِلسِنتراَل وَراَ اِلفَرَّع اَلرَّئيسي بِتاَع شِركِة اِلكَهرَبا
transliteration: hatilae'iilsintraal warailfarraA ilr'eesi bitaeA shirkit ilkahraba
translations: you will find the telephone centre behind the main branch of the electricity company

arz: بِتِشْرَب سِجَائِر؟ أَيّوَ، أَنَا بَشْرَب سِجَائِر
translations: do you smoke (cigarettes)? yes I do smoke (cigarettes)
in this garage they charge by the hour
the officials are strict
the dog is under the table
he is surrounded by many good people
the price of the magazine is relatively reasonable
could you give me some water?
I want to meet you, but late. OK?

arz: إمشي بِشويش عَلَشان الولاد مَا يِصحو
translations: leave slowly in order to not wake the kids
I didn't know.
we were very sleepy
I don't understand this word.

arz: روح أواَم السوبرماركت علشان محتاجين سكر
translations: go to the supermarket straight away because we need sugar

arz: أناَ وَ خُوياَ إشتَرَكناَ في نَادي وَادي دِجلَة
transliteration: 'ana wa chw|ya 'ishtarakna fi naedi waedi digla
translations: my brother and I joined digla's valley club

arz: نَظَرياً دَه كَلاَم كُوَيِس جِدّاً بَسّ عَملياً صَعب اِلتَنفيذ
transliteration: nazaryan dah kalaem kuwayis giddan bassaAamlyan saAb iltanfeez
translations: theoretically what you are saying is very good but in practice it is hard to do
Do you have matches? Yes, I have
the food will be ready right away

arz: طِلِّعوا يِعرَفوا بَعض مِن أياَم اِلمَدرَسَة
translations: apparently they know each other from school days
I trust in you
do I know you?
we can eat fish or chicken
he spends money as if he were rich

arz: زَيّ ما عَمَلت هَيَعْمَل في ك
translations: like you did for him, he will do for you

arz: إذا كان معك فلوس، سلّفني خمسين جنيه
transliteration: 'iza kaen maAa|ak filoos, sallif|ni chamseen gineeh
translations: If you have some money, lend me fifty pounds

arz: أنا هَكَلِّمُك بَعد ما أَخَلَّص شُغلي
translations: I will call you(m) when I have finished work

arz: أنا هَستَنّاك قُبَال الصَيدَلِيَّة اللي عَلى أوَّل الشارِع
translations: I will wait for you opposite the pharmacy at the beginning of the street
I called you three times yesterday

arz: مُفتاح النور اللي في أوديت ي مِش شَغّال
transliteration: muftaeah ilnoor il-li fi 'uoodit|i mish shaghghael
translations: the light switch that is in my bedroom isn't working
the upholsterer cut the material all along
he literally lost his mind

arz: دائماً في فرصة ثانية في امتحان اللغة
transliteration: dayman fi fursa thanya fi 'imtahaen il-lugha
translations: there is always a second chance in the language exam
I am [not] married

arz: لِغَايَةِ يَوْمَيْنِ فَاتَتْ اَلْجَوُّ كَانَ جَمِيلًا
transliteration: lighaeyit yoomeen fatu ilgaww kaen gameel
translations: until two days ago, the weather was pleasant
the people are all against the president
the police station is next to the embassy

arz: اِلفُرجَة عَلى اِلتِليفزيون بإستمرار مُضَرَّة جِداً
transliteration: ilfurga Aala iltileefzyoon b'istmraar mudarra gidan
translations: watching TV constantly is very unhealthy
I have some news.

arz: اِلتِلِفزيون دَه مِن غير شَهاَدَة ضَماَن
transliteration: iltilifzyoon dah min gheer shahaedit damaen
translations: this TV is without guarantee
we will go to the seaside

arz: أناَ هَشتِري اِلجَزمَة اِللي شُفتَها إمباَرِح
translations: I will buy the shoes that I saw yesterday

arz: وَراَ الصُّورَةِ دَه في جِنِينَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ أوي
translations: behind this wall is a very big garden

arz: أنا سأذهب إلى الشغل على حسب الجو
translations: I will go to work depending on the weather
the money was stolen while I was travelling

arz: أكيد الرياضة بتفرق في حياة أي حد
translations: sport certainly makes a difference in anybody's life
we will go out only when I have finished cleaning

arz: لاَزِم تَحَرَّك اِلدولاَب بِشويش عَلَشان مَ يِتكَسَر ش
transliteration: laezim taharrak ildoolaeb bishweesh Aalashaen ma|yitkasar|sh
translations: you have to move the cupboard slowly in order not to break it
he could have died during the operation
the feast is the day after tomorrow

arz: مُحتَمَل يِبقى في إنتِخاَباَت السَّنَة اللِّي جاية في إنجِلترا
transliteration: muhtamal yib'a fi 'intichabaet ilsana il-li gayya fi 'ingiltirra
translations: there will probably be an election next year in England
I want the shoes that fit
you must bring the news quickly

arz: مِش قَادِر ألاَقي اِلجَزمَة بِتَاعِت ي
translations: I can not find my shoes

arz: هَتُوصَل اِلحَمولَة كَمان عَشرين يَوْم تَقريباً في اِلمِيناَء
transliteration: hatuwsal ilhamoola kamaen Aashreen yoom ta'reeban fiilmeena'
translations: the cargo will arrive in the port in about twenty days

arz: مُمكِن تَجيب لي لَبَن بِدون دَسَم
translations: can you bring me some skimmed milk
your(f) bag is very pretty

arz: بِالرَّغمِ مِن كُلِّ الظُّروفِ بَسَّ هُوَ راضٍ
translations: despite all his circumstances he is content
tomorrow is an official holiday
even the coach didn't turn up at the club today
these books are interesting

arz: الصورة هتنفع حتى لو أبيض و أسود
translations: the photos are useful even if they are black and white
Do you want to come out after training?
I waited all day
what is this?
the doctor spoke to us about the medicine
Do you want to eat fish or chicken?

arz: هَيَحاوِل يَصَلَّح الكاميرا بَدَل مَا يِبَعْهَا
transliteration: hayihaewil yisallah ilkameera badal ma yibaA|ha
translations: he will try to fix the camera instead of selling it
the police forcibly arrested the troublemakers
medicine in india is very advanced
apparently it will rain tomorrow

arz: اِلكَهرَبا تَجي زِيَادَة عَن اِلطَبيعي اِلأُسبوع دَه
transliteration: ilkahraba biteegi ziyaeda Aan iltabyaAiil'usbooA dah
translations: the electricity is abnormally high this week
I know that he is bad
really the temperature will be forty degrees tomorrow

arz: لاَزِم يِمَحِّر اَلْحِيطَة أَوَّلاً وَبَعْدَ يِدْهِنْهَا
transliteration: laezim yimahhar ilheeta 'awalan wa baAdeen yidhin|ha
translations: you have to render the wall first and then you paint it
the wardrobe is opposite the window
if you need anything, ask me

arz: لَو الأتوبيس مَشي مِن غيرِك، هَتِعمِل إيه وَقتَها
transliteration: law il'utoobees mashi min gheer|ak, hatiAmil 'ieeh wa'taha
translations: if the bus leaves without you, what are you going to do then?

arz: مَ توقَّع شِ الكوباَيَة مِن عَلى التَرَبيزَة
translations: don't drop your glass from on the table
how many eggs do you want?

arz: هُوَ شَغّالٌ في القاموسِ مِنْ ثلاثِ سِنِينَ
transliteration: huwa shaghghael fiilqamoos min talaet sineen
translations: he has been working on the dictionary for three years
he beat the donkey without mercy
he finally got approval for travel

arz: لَمّا تَدخُل الْمَعْبَد مِش هَتَصَدَّق إن دَه حَقيقي
transliteration: lamma tadchul guwailmaAbad mish hatsadda' 'in dah ha'ee'i
translations: when you go into this temple you will not believe it's real
Are you busy now?

arz: لاَزِم اَلرَّئِيس يَتَعَامَل بِسِيَاسَة مَعَ اَلشَّعْب
translations: the president must deal tactfully with the people
we will not start until Susie arrives
He opened the door by force

arz: إمشي في الطريق ده طوالي و هتلاقي المكتبة
translations: Walk straight ahead that way and you will find the bookshop
I(f) am able to go to work

arz: اِلعَدّاَد شَغاَل عَلى طول مِش بِيوقَف
transliteration: ilAaddaed shaghael Aala tool mish biyoo'af
translations: the meter is working constantly, not stopping
the restaurant needs a little renovation
I want [only] one

arz: طول ما إنتَ بِتِروح اِلشُغل، هايبقى مَعَك فِلوس
transliteration: tool ma 'inta bitirooh ilshughl, haeyib'a maAa|ak filoos
translations: as long as you go to work, you will have money

arz: لاَزِم تِسقي اِلزَرع مِن وَقت لِلثّاني
translations: you have to water the plants from time to time

arz: طَبعاًَ لاَزِم تَحجِز في اِلكورس قَبل ما تِروح
translations: Of course, you have to reserve for the course before you go
the electricity was cut suddenly
I need money in order to buy food

arz: بين الزرع لقى قطة صغيرة جداً
translations: between the plants he found a very small cat
they will travel very soon

arz: أنا جِيت مَصر عَلَشان أدرُس عَرَبي
translations: I came to Egypt in order to study Arabic
the seven wonders of the world

arz: عَلى اِلعَموم اِلرِياح هَتَفضَل تَتَغَيَّر كِدَه
transliteration: Aala ilAamoom ilriyaeh hatifdil titghayyar kidah
translations: anyway, the wind will keep changing like this

arz: لَو كَانَ عِندِي عَرَبِيَّةٌ كُنتُ هَاسَلِّفُهَا لَكَ
translations: If I had a car, I would lend it to you(m)
you must speak clearly
television has become really boring
anyway he is very stupid
this jacket is waterproof

arz: الفاكهة حلوة أوي دلوقتي في السوق
translations: the fruit is very delicious in the market now

arz: هُوَّ بِيِلْعَب كُورَةً طُولَ الأُسْبُوعِ مَا عَدَا يَوْمَ الْخَمِيسِ
transliteration: huwwa biyiliAab koora tool il'usbooA maeAada yoom ilchimees
translations: he plays football all week except thursday

arz: خَدت سُلفَة عَشان مُرَتَّب ي خِلِص
translations: I took a loan because my salary is finished

arz: بَحِبّ في الأكل المصري حاجات زَيّ المحشي والشَكشوكَة
translations: I like egytian food, things such as mahshy and shakshuka

arz: إحناَ عَمَلناَ بِيضَ بِاَلْبَسْطِرْمَةِ عَلى اِلفَطَار
translations: we made eggs and bastirma for breakfast

arz: اِلحُكومَة بِتَنَفِّذ قَراَراتِهَا غَصْبًا عَنِ الشَّعب
translations: the government is making its decisions against the people's will
